title: found footage
description: a scary modpack that aims to make your adventure a found footage like play through
body:
**Found footage modpack** is a modpack that adds horror mods, sounds, and really immersive gameplay

If you are playing with a buddy you can be revived.

Tissou's Zombie Pack by Tissou: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)
